description: 3D / Immersive design tokens — interactive 3D objects, spatial depth, physics-based motion, glass overlays on dark/aurora backgrounds. Apple visionOS / Spline aesthetic.

depth.zAxis: elements exist in 3D space — foreground, midground, background
depth.parallax: different layers move at different scroll speeds

lighting.rule: ONE consistent light source — all shadows align
lighting.highlights: top edge highlights on 3D objects (light from above)

background.rule: dark or aurora — NEVER flat white (flattens 3D)

implementation.level3: Three.js / React Three Fiber — full custom control

overlay.rule: 3D is the star, UI should not compete

typography.rule: minimal, clean — 3D is the visual hero

forbidden: too many 3D objects (one hero is enough)
